name: fmutool

metadata.name: fmutool
metadata.summary: IMPORTANT: this package was renamed 'fmu_manipulation_toolbox'. It won't be updated anymore. Please use those new package.FMUTool is a python application which help to modify a Functional Mock-up Units (FMUs) without recompilation or to group them into FMU Containers

documentation:
FMUTool is a python application which help to modify a Functional Mock-up Units (FMUs) 
without recompilation. It mainly modifies the `modelDescription.xml` file. It is highly customizable.

Manipulating the `modelDescription.xml` can be a dangerous thing! Communicating with the FMU-developer and adapting
the way the FMU is generated, is the preferable when possible.

FMUTool also allows to group FMU's inside FMU Containers.

functions.name: fmutool.cli.make_wide
documentation: Return a wider HelpFormatter, if possible.

classes.name: fmutool.fmu_operations.FMU
documentation:
Unpack and Repack facilities for FMU package. Once unpacked, we can process Operation on
modelDescription.xml file.

classes.name: fmutool.fmu_operations.Manipulation
documentation: Parse modelDescription.xml file and create a modified version

classes.name: fmutool.fmu_operations.ManipulationSkipTag
documentation: Exception: We need to skip every thing until matching closing tag

classes.name: fmutool.fmu_operations.OperationAbstract
